recentDecisions: Sequential task→validate→task chaining enforced (not parallel) — design doc and memory updated
Parity validation blocks first implementation bead — different sub-agent validates
Multi-step Remove modal (3 steps: confirm → provider select → review) replaces single confirm
Per-item action buttons ([d] [x] [e]) in metadata panel, global ([a]) in topbar
Buttons show/hide based on capability (not grayed out — looked bad)
Type detail text truncated to fit buttons (not buttons truncated)
checkHookStatus must verify hook in provider's settings.json, not just installed.json
Branch protection disabled during rapid iteration
Builtin/shared content should move to OpenScribbler/syllago-registry (syllago-5wdcb)
Toast stacking: up to 3 visible, oldest non-error dropped
Toast ordering: action toast fires before catalog rescan
Esc dismisses toast before modal when both visible
nextSteps: Start Phase B: Install Modal — write design spec, implementation plan, parity validation
Follow the bead chain protocol: spec → plan → parity → impl-1 → validate-1 → impl-2 → validate-2 → ... → phase-validation

Phase B scope (from design doc): provider picker with 'already installed' detection, location selection (global/project/custom), method selection (symlink/copy), JSON merge path for hooks/MCP, risk banner component

context.notes: Branch protection is OFF on main (disabled for fast iteration). Re-enable when iteration speed slows. The design doc at docs/plans/2026-03-26-tui-wizards-design.md has the full Phase B spec including install modal steps, provider picker, and test requirements. installed.json has a known architectural gap: hooks don't track which provider they were installed to (workaround in place via settings.json hash verification).
